resources.string: We couldn’t find this barcode. Try taking a photo of the nutrition label.
We couldn’t reach the product database. Check your connection and try again.
Please check your internet connection and try again.
Try taking the photo again with better lighting.
Please contact support if the issue persists.
Snap a photo, know the calories.
By continuing you agree to CaloShape\'s
Tip: add a Google account in Settings → Accounts and try again
The code is incorrect. Please try again.
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Please enter the 4-digit code we\'ve just sent to
This will be used to calibrate your custom plan.
We only use your age to improve your experience and calorie estimation accuracy.
We only use your data to improve your experience and our calorie estimates.
This will be used to calibrate your custom plan.
We only use your data to improve your experience and our calorie estimates.
This will be used to calibrate your custom plan.
How often do you exercise each week?
This will help calibrate your personalized plan.
This helps us tailor your calorie plan.
Based on this goal, we’ll create a more suitable daily calorie recommendation for you.
This will be used to calibrate your custom plan.
Using CaloShape AI can triple your weight\nloss efficiency
CaloShape AI makes everything simple\nand keeps you accountable
Enable notifications for gentle reminders to log meals—so your calories, macros, and progress stay on track. Slip-ups happen; timely nudges help you bounce back fast.
Log this meal to keep your calories and macros on track.
Sync daily activity between CaloShape AI and health apps to get more complete records and insights.

CaloShape reads your steps, active calories, and exercise data to estimate daily activity burn, update your calorie dashboard, and improve progress insights. You can revoke access anytime in Health Connect.
We’re using your goals, body data, and preferences to tailor your daily targets.
Your personal health plan is ready!
Sources are below: See all references ›
Health scores guide you, so habits form naturally
Log meals in one tap, staying consistent is easy
See daily calories clearly, and never lose track
Carbs × protein × fat, smart balance, better results
Based on official dietary guidelines,\nfor reference only, not medical advice.
We couldn\'t find this referral code.
You can\'t use your own referral code.
This account has already applied a referral code.
Subscribed accounts can\'t apply a referral code.
We can\'t apply a referral code right now.
We can\'t apply it right now. Please try again later.
Referral code can\'t be applied right now.\nPlease try again later.
We could not get your local Google Play price right now. Please try again.
Unlock CaloShape AI to\nreach your goals faster.
Your Google Play account already has an active CaloShape subscription. Restore it to this CaloShape account before using premium features.
Could not restore purchase. Please try again.
Payment is being processed. Premium access will be available after Google Play confirms the purchase.
Unable to check trial eligibility. Please try again.
Tap Spin to reveal your exclusive gift.
Please wait until the wheel stops.
This offer is revealed after the wheel stops.
Scan meals faster. Track macros smarter.\nStay on plan daily.
Close this screen? This price is gone
Not sure? Turn on free trial
Unable to verify membership. Please try again.
Log your first meal today to see a health score based on its nutrition details.
Today\'s average is low. Consider more protein, fiber, and lower sugar or sodium.
There\'s room to improve. Try adding vegetables and quality protein.
You\'re on track. Keep portions steady and watch sugar, sodium, and fiber.
Good balance today. Keep choosing nutrient-dense foods.
Great balance today. Keep building consistent habits.
Connect Google Health to track your steps
Install Health Connect to track your steps
Health Connect isn’t available on this device
BMI helps estimate whether your body weight is in a generally healthy range.
BMI is a general guide. It does not directly measure body fat, muscle mass, or overall health.
Keep it up! Getting started is the hardest part!
Keep your fiber, sugar, and sodium balanced.
%1$d kcal left to hit today\'s goal
Includes logged workouts and activity calories estimated from daily steps.
%1$s ml left to reach today\'s goal
Excludes today and averages only days with data.
Log weight to start your trend
Every small step brings you closer to your goal.
Reminders are on. If device notification permission is allowed, these reminders repeat daily.
Reminders are off. Turn on the switch on the Home fasting card to receive these notifications.
Your %1$s plan ends at %2$s. When reminders are on, CaloShape sends two daily notifications.
You can start eating and log meals when needed.
One hour before the window closes at %1$s, CaloShape reminds you to finish your last meal.
Ease in with a steady rhythm—14 hours to reset appetite cues and energy.
Crowd favorite for a reason—16 hours to stay focused and in a lean groove.
Balanced split: fast 12 hours, eat within a 12-hour window — perfect for beginners.
18 hours of fasting, with a 6-hour eating window — a leaner schedule than 16:8.
Stay laser-focused—1–2 mindful meals within a tight 4-hour window.
One intentional meal in a 2-hour slot—keep water intake up.
We’ll remind you at this time each day when your eating window starts.
Your eating window runs %1$s–%2$s. Log meals as you go to keep today accurate.
1 hour left in your eating window
Your window closes at %1$s. If you plan one last meal, log it before you wrap up.
No workouts in the last 7 days.
Describe the type of exercise and the duration
Please do not close the app or lock your device
Failed to save. Please try again.
The workout description may be incorrect, or the internet connection is weak. For example: 30 min Running.
Add this workout time to your activity log
Camera permission is required to scan
Tap + to add your first meal of the day
Saved foods from the last 15 days.
This meal will be removed from your Saved Foods list, but it will still remain in your recent records.
Are you sure you want to permanently delete this meal record? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete your account? This will permanently delete your CaloShape data, including food logs, weight records, and related settings. This action cannot be undone.
No active Google Play subscription found
Your subscription has been restored to this CaloShape account.
Your subscription is linked to this CaloShape account, but Google Play still reports a payment issue. Please update your payment method in Google Play to keep your subscription active.
We couldn’t find an active CaloShape subscription on the current Google Play account. Make sure you’re using the Google Play account that made the purchase, then try again.
We could not restore your subscription right now. Please check your connection and try again from Settings.
This Google Play subscription is already linked to another CaloShape account. Sign in to the original account to use it, or contact support if you can’t access that account.
We found an active CaloShape subscription or trial associated with the Google Play account on this device. You can restore it to the CaloShape account you’re currently signed in to.
Your premium access is still active for now, but your payment needs attention.
Update your Google Play payment method to avoid losing AI scan and premium features.
They subscribe. You get 30 days free.
Keep the current bright, clean look.
Use a darker, softer interface for everyday tracking.
Logout failed. Check your connection and try again.
Reward unlocks after your friend subscribes with no refund.
Send your code to a friend who wants to track food smarter.
They start a paid CaloShape AI subscription using your invite.
After the subscription is verified with no refund, your premium period is extended.

Join me on CaloShape AI! My referral code is:
%1$s

%2$s
We will use this goal to calculate your progress.
Camera only works in the running app, not in Preview.
Camera is not available in this screen.
No camera app found on this device.
Please enable Camera permission in Settings.
This weight will be recorded for %1$s
When did you step on the scale?
We only use your height to improve your experience and calorie estimation accuracy.
We only use your age to improve your experience and calorie estimation accuracy.
Used only to personalize and improve estimate accuracy.
We will use it as your baseline for progress.
Date rings help you quickly see how each day compares with your calorie goal.
All platform notifications will appear here.
Please check your connection and try again.
Add CaloShape to your Home screen
Track calories, macros, and quick actions without opening the app.
Press and hold an empty area on your phone Home screen until the menu appears.
Choose Widgets from the Home screen menu.
Scroll or search for CaloShape AI, then open the widget list.
Touch and hold the widget, drag it to your preferred Home screen, then lift your finger.
Some phone brands and launchers use different names. Try Home settings, long-pressing the CaloShape AI app icon, or searching for Widgets in your launcher.
Manual entry is not ready yet. Switching to label scan for now.
CaloShape macros and quick actions widget
Successful referrals will appear here after verification.
